title: Zoe Thorne Gold Top
company: along too, so there's no need to miss out! Comedian and mum of two Zoe Thorne will ensure plenty of laughs as she talks about the trials and tribulations of parenting and childbirth, and you can feel like a grownup out on the town again. But you're also free to feed, change and rock your baby without worrying about disturbing the rest of the audience, plus you'll be home by witching hour. And best of all, there will be no winding of any bobbins in sight.
